2.title: Day 2 Reflection
paragraphs: On the second day of our trip, March 10th, was a time to remember and reflect on how many lives were changed. From meeting with members of the Polish Jewish community, hearing about the courageous acts of the Righteous Among the Nations, from touring the Jewish Historical Institute and walking along parts of the former Warsaw Ghetto, it really hit that the Holocaust wasn't just a tragedy that is counted in numbers but rather in lives lost, communities destroyed and stories lost. As we stood by all of the memorial plaques and preserved remains of what once was the Ghetto, we realized that there is such great value in keeping memories alive and making sure the voices of those who suffered and those who resisted do not die.
